Chronology of every recorded fact about [[sacred arts]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Sacred arts are the path of refining a spirit and pursuing connection to all of creation.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Sacred arts involve advancing through realms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Sacred arts are a field of knowledge or practice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Sacred arts are used by practitioners to manipulate the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Revenge is considered part of the sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The sacred arts are described as a game where life is the only bet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Sacred arts possess immense force compared to physical strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — The nature of the sacred arts is that each advancement causes one to leave behind everyone they know.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Sacred arts must be learned the right way to survive Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Arelius family collects information pertinent to the sacred arts.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Eithan wants to pursue the sacred arts to their height.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Sacred arts are described as real power that can stand over the entire world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon desired advancement in the sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The sacred arts are said to be lonely.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross believes he could become a master of the sacred arts.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Kiro cannot match Meira in the sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin trains in the sacred arts.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sophara can use the sacred arts at a high level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The goal of all sacred arts is complete control.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — The sacred arts have an underlying structure that can be comprehended.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin can learn from the Eight-Man Empire's sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Blood Sage claimed his power could change the way sacred arts are practiced.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — There was no evidence of sacred arts in the world.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
